channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Vusi Mahlasela reflects on music, resilience and his new album Questions & Answers
item.description: In this intimate profile, legendary South African musician Vusi “the Voice” Mahlasela opens up about his life, influences and upcoming album, Questions & Answers. Meeting at Café Barcelona in Hatfield...

item.title: Premier League clarifies VAR decision on Nick Pope foul against Arsenal
item.description: Arsenal secured an important win over Newcastle United at the Emirates Stadium, but the match was surrounded by controversy after goalkeeper Nick Pope avoided a red card following a late challenge on ...

item.title: Military Court Martial Faces Criticism Over Alleged Mistreatment of Officers in Coup Case
item.description: The General Court Martial wey Nigeria Defence Headquarters (DHQ) don set up don dey attract plenty wahala after serious allegations come up about how dem dey treat the officers wey dem dey try. At lea...

item.title: Pakistan reports 71 child deaths from measles amid low vaccination coverage
item.description: In Pakistan, measles has tragically claimed the lives of 71 children during the first four months of 2026, with Sindh reporting the highest number of fatalities at 40, followed by Punjab and Khyber Pa...

item.title: Donald Trump and Melania evacuated safely after gunfire at White House event
item.description: During the White House Correspondents’ Dinner at the Washington Hilton, President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump were swiftly evacuated after a series of gunshots were reported inside the v...

item.title: Arthur Sales urges Sundowns to bounce back and deliver against Richards Bay
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns striker Arthur Sales has issued a wake-up call ahead of his team's crucial match against Richards Bay in the Betway Premiership. Sundowns, coming off a disappointing 1-1 draw with St...

item.title: Four Charged Following Arson Attack on Jewish Community Ambulances in London
item.description: Four individuals, including three men aged 18 to 20 and a 17-year-old boy, have appeared at the Old Bailey over an arson attack on Jewish community ambulances in Golders Green, north-west London. The ...

item.title: Explosion Near Police Station in Northern Ireland Leads to Evacuations
item.description: A security alert has been triggered in Dunmurray, Northern Ireland, following an explosion in the early hours of Sunday morning near a police station. Police are currently at the scene, which is locat...

item.title: Trump safe following security incident at White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: During the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, former U.S. President Donald Trump was unharmed after a security incident involving a shooting. Reports indicate that a suspect armed with multiple weapo...

item.title: AFC Leopards and Gor Mahia Set for Crucial Title-Deciding Mashemeji Derby
item.description: AFC Leopards and Gor Mahia are set to face off in the 99th Mashemeji Derby at Nyayo National Stadium on Sunday, April 26, in what is shaping up to be a key match in the Kenya Premier League title race...

item.title: Manitoba to Implement Social Media Restrictions for Minors
item.description: Premier Wab Kinew of Manitoba has announced the province is planning to introduce legislation mirroring Australia's recent social media ban for children under the age of 16. The specifics of the legis...

item.title: Governor Soludo Offers Automatic Jobs to 37 First-Class Graduates in Anambra
item.description: Governor Chukwuma Soludo of Anambra has announced that 37 first-class graduates of Chukwuemeka Odumegwu Ojukwu University (COOU) will be automatically employed by the state government. This announceme...

item.title: Former Lawmaker Alleges Long-Term Obi-Kwankwaso Alliance Plan Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: One former House of Representatives member from Kwara State don talk say there be serious political moves going on between Peter Obi and Rabiu Kwankwaso as dem dey prepare for 2027 general elections. ...

item.title: Trump calls off envoys’ Pakistan trip amid stalled Iran peace negotiations
item.description: US President Donald Trump has cancelled the planned visit of his envoys Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff to Pakistan, which was intended to facilitate peace talks with Iran. Trump said the trip was scr...

item.title: South Africa questions mass summoning of African leaders to international summits
item.description: South Africa is signalling growing frustration with the way international summits involving African leaders are often organised, particularly by European and other developed nations. Officials in Pret...

item.title: Shifting Power in Defining History from Empire to Communities
item.description: Stephen Acabado, a professor of anthropology at the University of California-Los Angeles, critiques how the 1904 St. Louis World’s Fair shaped American perceptions of Filipinos through the Philippine ...

item.title: Trump Releases Video of Shooting Attempt at White House Correspondents' Dinner
item.description: On April 25, 2026, President Donald Trump shared a video and photo on Truth Social showing a suspect attempting to breach a security checkpoint at the White House Correspondents' Dinner held at the Wa...

item.title: Tensions rise in Bhabanipur ahead of West Bengal polls; Congress flags law and order concerns in Berhampore
item.description: The political atmosphere in West Bengal has intensified ahead of the upcoming Assembly elections, particularly in the high-profile Bhabanipur constituency. A tense situation unfolded when supporters o...

item.title: Advice on Managing Marital Strain Caused by a Spouse's Pornography Habit
item.description: The article from Rappler’s People section discusses a letter from a married woman struggling to forgive her husband for his porn addiction. She describes her shock upon discovering his repeated use of...

item.title: Survey reveals weak cybersecurity practices and policy gaps in Pakistani workplaces
item.description: A recent survey conducted by Kaspersky titled “Cybersecurity in the Workplace: Employee Knowledge and Behaviour” highlights serious gaps in cybersecurity policies across organisations in Pakistan. Acc...
